requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 Direction
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2方向
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2方向

summary.en: Nauru follows a IEC electrical legacy and the practical EV charging direction is IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC charging and CCS2 for DC fast charging. This is not an Americas J1772 / CCS1 market. Connector conformity should be confirmed in the NUC, ministry, donor-funded project, tender, site-owner, or charge-point-operator specification for each project, but China GB/T connector hardware is physically incompatible with the IEC Type 2 / CCS2 ecosystem.
summary.zh: 瑙鲁具有IEC电气体系传承，电动汽车充电的实务方向为交流IEC 62196 Type 2、直流快充CCS2。该市场不是美洲J1772 / CCS1体系。每个项目应在NUC、ministry、NUC、招标、场地方或充电点运营商规范中确认接口符合性，但中国GB/T接口硬件与IEC Type 2 / CCS2体系在物理上不兼容。
summary.zht: 諾魯具有IEC電氣體系傳承，電動汽車充電的實務方向為交流IEC 62196 Type 2、直流快充CCS2。該市場不是美洲J1772 / CCS1體系。每個項目應在NUC、ministry、NUC、招標、場地方或充電點運營商規範中確認接口符合性，但中國GB/T接口硬體與IEC Type 2 / CCS2體系在物理上不兼容。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — AC Type 2 coupler dimensional compatibility
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers, including CCS2 configuration
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements
IEC 61851-23 and IEC 61851-24 — DC EVSE and DC communication

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 CAN communication. GB/T AC connector geometry, gender, signaling, and contact arrangement differ from IEC 62196 Type 2, and GB/T DC couplers are not CCS2. GB/T charger hardware therefore cannot be treated as a connector-compatible substitute for Nauru IEC deployments.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并配套GB/T 27930 CAN通信。GB/T交流接口在几何、接口性别、信号和触点排列方面不同于IEC 62196 Type 2，GB/T直流耦合器也不是CCS2。因此GB/T充电桩硬件不能作为瑙鲁IEC部署的接口兼容替代品。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並配套GB/T 27930 CAN通訊。GB/T交流接口在幾何、接口性別、信號和觸點排列方面不同於IEC 62196 Type 2，GB/T直流耦合器也不是CCS2。因此GB/T充電樁硬體不能作為諾魯IEC部署的接口兼容替代品。

gap.en: Conversion from GB/T to Nauru IEC Type 2 / CCS2 requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable, locking system, proximity-pilot and control-pilot circuits, labels, temperature-rise evidence, spare parts, and for DC chargers the communication stack from GB/T 27930 to the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 direction where required. Adapters should not be treated as a project-compliant substitute.
gap.zh: 从GB/T转换为瑙鲁IEC Type 2 / CCS2，需要重新设计耦合器、电缆、锁止系统、接近导引和控制导引电路、标签、温升证据、备件；直流充电桩还需按要求将通信栈从GB/T 27930转换为CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118方向。转接器不应作为项目合规替代方案。
gap.zht: 從GB/T轉換為諾魯IEC Type 2 / CCS2，需要重新設計耦合器、電纜、鎖止系統、接近導引和控制導引電路、標籤、溫升證據、備件；直流充電樁還需按要求將通訊棧從GB/T 27930轉換為CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118方向。轉接器不應作為項目合規替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is specified by NUC, ministry, donor-funded project, tender, site-owner, or CPO requirements; GB/T substitution is not physically compatible
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

source.publisher: Government of Nauru ministry responsible for energy and infrastructure

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nauru IEC Type 2 / CCS2 deployments require connector hardware and protocol redesign for GB/T chargers. This is an IEC / IEC-market direction, not an Americas J1772 / CCS1 direction, and GB/T connectors cannot be accepted as plug-compatible.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 瑙鲁IEC Type 2 / CCS2部署要求GB/T充电桩进行接口硬件和协议重新设计。该方向属于IEC / IEC市场体系，不是美洲J1772 / CCS1方向，GB/T接口不能视为插接兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 諾魯IEC Type 2 / CCS2部署要求GB/T充電樁進行接口硬體和協議重新設計。該方向屬於IEC / IEC市場體系，不是美洲J1772 / CCS1方向，GB/T接口不能視為插接兼容。
